title: Default
objective: Start the default workstream for Meeting Ingest.

Runtime provenance binding, preflight/readiness equivalence, blocker classification/counts, explicit recovery, canonical artifact/provider docs, reusable sub-agent prompt, concrete host-wrapper snippets, and Claude/Codex repo+installed mirrors are consistent. Final independent closure review found no issues. Full verification passed 365 tests and git diff --check.
